---
name: Documentation
about: Report unclear, missing, or incorrect documentation
title: '[Docs] '
labels: documentation
---

## Which document

Path or URL of the doc with the issue (e.g. `README.md`, `CODEBASE.md`, `ROADMAP.md`).

## What's wrong

Describe what's confusing, missing, or incorrect.

## Suggested fix

If you have one. Otherwise leave blank.

## Audience

Who is the affected reader? (self-hoster, contributor, teacher, etc.)
